title: AdvancedTech  - Slimefun
description: AdvancedTech is a Slimefun Addon That Adds Exciting New Machines to the Game!
body:
# Advanced Tech Introducing AdvancedTech, an immersive add-on for the popular Minecraft plugin Slimefun. This Expansion Adds New Features Like Handheld Diggers and Powerful Solar Panels! # Download You Can Download the Latest STABLE Release Here on Modrinth.
But, for the DEV Releases, Please Head to [Build Page](https://thebusybiscuit.github.io/builds/PranavVerma-droid/AdvancedTech/dev/). # Dependencies You Need Slimefun 4 to Use This Plugin. Download Latest Stable: [Here](https://thebusybiscuit.github.io/builds/TheBusyBiscuit/Slimefun4/stable/)
Download Latest Dev: [Here](https://thebusybiscuit.github.io/builds/TheBusyBiscuit/Slimefun4/master/) ## Slimefun Official Discord Server Slimefun Official Discord Server Join Link: https://discord.gg/SqD3gg5SAU
